title: Unicode tokenization with explicit special-token policy
description: Tokenize fixed UTF-8 bytes with the production binding's explicit BOS and special-token policy and compare only the resulting token IDs; token-to-piece and detokenization are separate properties.

source.note: A small cross-encoding smoke vector using parseSpecial=true, which is the production safe binding's exposed policy; broad family and random-input coverage remains in focused upstream tests.
